name: Lune - Expedition 33
description:
Lune, from Expedition 33.

Lune had a fair bit more backstory than I expected her to have (nothing spoiler-y, I promise.)

I did include a very basic description of the plot, if only to describe what the point of Expedition 33 is to even begin with. So references to the Paintress, the Gommage, the time-frame of events should all be recognized, in a broad sense.

I posted Sciel already, and I will be doing Maelle as well.

As always, if you have any ideas how I can improve things, please let me know!
creator: bellerose2015
